heading: Open access by unregulated transmitting utilities
label: 824j–1 Open access by unregulated transmitting utilities

children.heading: Definition of unregulated transmitting utility
children.label: a Definition of unregulated transmitting utility

children.text: owns or operates facilities used for the transmission of electric energy in interstate commerce; and
is an entity described in .section 824(f) of this title
at rates that are comparable to those that the unregulated transmitting utility charges itself; and

on terms and conditions (not relating to rates) that are comparable to those under which the unregulated transmitting utility provides transmission services to itself and that are not unduly discriminatory or preferential.
sells not more than 4,000,000 megawatt hours of electricity per year;
does not own or operate any transmission facilities that are necessary for operating an interconnected transmission system (or any portion of the system); or
meets other criteria the Commission determines to be in the public interest.

children.heading: Local distribution facilities
children.label: d Local distribution facilities
children.text: The requirements of subsection (b) shall not apply to facilities used in local distribution.

children.heading: Exemption termination
children.label: e Exemption termination
children.text: If the Commission, after an evidentiary hearing held on a complaint and after giving consideration to reliability standards established under section 824 of this title, finds on the basis of a preponderance of the evidence that any exemption granted pursuant to subsection (c) unreasonably impairs the continued reliability of an interconnected transmission system, the Commission shall revoke the exemption granted to the transmitting utility.o

children.heading: Application to unregulated transmitting utilities
children.label: f Application to unregulated transmitting utilities
children.text: The rate changing procedures applicable to public utilities under subsections (c) and (d) of are applicable to unregulated transmitting utilities for purposes of this section.section 824d of this title

children.heading: Remand
children.label: g Remand
children.text: In exercising authority under subsection (b)(1), the Commission may remand transmission rates to an unregulated transmitting utility for review and revision if necessary to meet the requirements of subsection (b).

children.heading: Other requests
children.label: h Other requests
children.text: The provision of transmission services under subsection (b) does not preclude a request for transmission services under .section 824j of this title

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: i Limitation
children.text: The Commission may not require a State or municipality to take action under this section that would violate a private activity bond rule for purposes of .section 141 of title 26

children.heading: Transfer of control of transmitting facilities
children.label: j Transfer of control of transmitting facilities
children.text: Nothing in this section authorizes the Commission to require an unregulated transmitting utility to transfer control or operational control of its transmitting facilities to a Transmission Organization that is designated to provide nondiscriminatory transmission access.
